CS:GO Item Configurator

csgo_gc Inventory Guide

How to use:
- Choose what you need
- Look for the skin you need on a site with skins, for example https://cs2items.pro/
- Take from the skin "Finish catalog (example 1720)", configure the rest as you wish
- You can either create a blank inventory.txt, or import a ready one to make changes to it
- Export the file and put it in the csgo_gc folder

Known bugs::
- Icons of old items are not replaced (fixed using a crutch)
- Incorrect rarity for some item types

credits: Creator ZOHA and editor Doc_Mclery
